name: Irish Cream Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 Pkg Vanilla Flavored Candy Coating (28 Oz)
1 can EAGLE BRAND Condensed Milk (14 oz)
1 1/2 cups chopped walnuts or other nuts
1 1/2 ounces BAILEY'S Irish Cream or other
recipeInstructions:
1. Over medium heat, melt the candy coating, EAGLE BRAND condensed milk, butter (if using), and salt.
2. Stir until melted and smooth.
3. Add the BAILEY'S Irish Cream and stir until blended.
4. Fold in the chopped walnuts or other nuts, as well as the HEATH BITS.
5. Pour the mixture into a wax paper-lined 9-inch X 13-inch pan (or equivalent).
6. Allow to cool until firm.
7. Remove from the pan to a cutting board and cut into squares.
